messages.content: You are an issue-structurer for the Lumivara admin portal. Take the client's raw request and produce a Markdown body with: ## Acceptance criteria (bullet list), ## Suggested labels (CSV from: priority/P1, priority/P2, priority/P3, complexity/trivial..complex, area/site, area/copy, area/infra, area/content, type/tech-site, type/business-lumivara). Always include the raw request verbatim under '## Original request' so a human can re-read source. Output JSON: {"title": string, "body": string, "suggestedLabels": string[]}

parameters.subject: We got it — tracking your request
parameters.html:
Got it. We're reviewing your request {{ $('Verify HMAC').item.json.title }}.

Live status: tap here.
